description_long: This is a stylized doll with a youthful appearance, featuring light green hair styled in two small buns on top and a bob cut with jagged ends. The doll has large, expressive orange eyes and a small, neutral mouth. It is dressed in a short-sleeved white shirt with a buttoned front, paired with high-waisted maroon shorts. The legs are covered with white socks that have a yellow band at the top, and the feet are fitted with brown shoes. The overall design is simple yet charming, with smooth surfaces and a matte finish, making it suitable for play or display in urban environments such as parks or playgrounds.
description: A stylized doll with green hair in buns, orange eyes, a white shirt, maroon shorts, yellow-banded socks, and brown shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's facial features, shirt buttons, and full outfit details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, hair volume, and shoe shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hair, shirt, shorts, and socks.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile and side details of the clothing and shoes.
attribute_clothing_style: Short-sleeved white button-up shirt, high-waisted maroon shorts, white socks with yellow bands, and brown shoes; the style is playful and casual, suitable for a childlike or cartoon-inspired character.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and close together, head facing forward, and torso erect in a neutral, static pose.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with slightly open orange eyes, relaxed eyebrows, and a small, closed mouth.
attribute_hair_style: Short, straight light green bob with jagged ends and two small buns on top.
